data.name: Undercity of Sin
data.detailed_description:
Asuna Hoshizuki is beautiful, loudmouthed, and hits like a freight train. A jobless dropout, she doesn't have much of a life, but she has a loving mother and a family restaurant she helps out at. But after a run-in with a band of yakuza, she finds herself deep in debt to a crime family. With a net worth amounting to a few loose coins and some pocket lint, she's left with no choice but to work for the very men she's indebted to. But in the process, she learns about a secret underground world, a cyberpunk city hidden from sight. Now to pay off her debt, Asuna will have to use her incredible strength to help the Matsuba Clan seize control of the crime-ridden Undercity.

Experience a story of crime and gang warfare as you fight your way through eight procedurally generated dungeons full of machine soldiers and superpowered weaponry, and explore a skill tree with numerous ways to power up your character as you overcome this traditional turn-based RPG.

A Cyberpunk Yakuza-Themed Story

Dive into a cyberpunk world and the city's dangerous underbelly! Get entangled with the yakuza and struggle to regain your freedom!

Eight Special Dungeons

Explore eight procedurally generated dungeons as you battle your way to freedom through traditional turn-based combat!

Skill Tree

Unlock passive and active skills through an expansive skill tree! Level up or use items to farm skill points and turn Asuna into an unbeatable hero!

data.short_description: Asuna Hoshizuki is beautiful, loudmouthed, and hits like a freight train. A jobless dropout, she doesn't have much of a life, but she has a loving mother and a family restaurant she helps out at.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 11/10/8
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.

data.legal_notice: © Kagura Games and Manten Kobo, All Rights Reserved.
